name: signals-api
description: signals.actor REST API — creator intelligence, LinkedIn enrichment, and engagement platform
rules: All requests require an X-API-Key header with a valid API key (format: sk_ + 32 hex chars)
All responses use envelope format: { success: boolean, data: ..., meta?: { page, limit, total, totalPages } }
Error responses: { success: false, error: string }
Timestamps are Unix epoch seconds (not milliseconds)
Team scoping is automatic — non-admin users only see creators assigned to their team
Admin-only endpoints return 403 for non-admin API keys
Credit costs: GOOGLE_LOOKUP=10, LINKEDIN_PROFILE=10, POST_SCRAPED=1, AI_ENRICHMENT=1, MEDIA_PROCESSED=1
Insufficient credits return HTTP 402 with { error: 'insufficient_credits', balance: number }
Enterprise teams have credits_balance=-1 (unlimited, no deduction)
Boolean fields are stored as 0/1 integers in responses
